---
title: "Site-PGLS Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  pgls_tsv: NULL
  site_diag_tsv: NULL
  intval_tsv: NULL
  extremes_tsv: NULL
  excess_tsv: NULL
  traitname: "unknown_trait"
  output_dir: "."
  top_hits_n: 20
  top_genes_n: 20
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scales)
  library(knitr)
})

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 13))

read_tsv_safe <- function(path, columns = NULL) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path) || !file.exists(path)) {
    if (is.null(columns)) {
      return(tibble())
    }
    return(as_tibble(setNames(replicate(length(columns), logical(0), simplify = FALSE), columns)))
  }
  readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
}

pgls_df <- read_tsv_safe(params$pgls_tsv)
diag_df <- read_tsv_safe(params$site_diag_tsv)
intval_df <- read_tsv_safe(params$intval_tsv)
extremes_df <- read_tsv_safe(params$extremes_tsv)
excess_df <- read_tsv_safe(params$excess_tsv)

# Handle primary p-value columns: prefer two-sided metrics when available.
if ("p_pgls_two_sided" %in% names(pgls_df)) {
  pgls_df <- pgls_df %>% 
    mutate(
      p_pgls = p_pgls_two_sided,
      q_p_pgls = q_p_pgls_two_sided,
      sig_p_pgls = sig_p_pgls_two_sided
    )
} else if ("p_pgls_pos" %in% names(pgls_df)) {
  pgls_df <- pgls_df %>%
    mutate(
      p_pgls = p_pgls_pos,
      q_p_pgls = q_p_pgls_pos,
      sig_p_pgls = sig_p_pgls_pos
    )
}

if (!"sig_p_pgls" %in% names(pgls_df)) pgls_df$sig_p_pgls <- logical(nrow(pgls_df))
if (!"q_p_pgls" %in% names(pgls_df)) pgls_df$q_p_pgls <- NA_real_
if (!"p_pgls" %in% names(pgls_df)) pgls_df$p_pgls <- NA_real_

gene_summary <- if (nrow(pgls_df) == 0) {
  tibble(
    Gene = character(),
    tested_sites = integer(),
    significant_sites = integer(),
    best_q_p_pgls = numeric(),
    best_p_pgls = numeric(),
    mean_beta_top = numeric()
  )
} else {
  pgls_df %>%
    group_by(Gene) %>%
    summarise(
      tested_sites = sum(is.finite(p_pgls)),
      significant_sites = sum(sig_p_pgls %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      best_q_p_pgls = suppressWarnings(min(q_p_pgls, na.rm = TRUE)),
      best_p_pgls = suppressWarnings(min(p_pgls, na.rm = TRUE)),
      mean_beta_top = mean(beta_top, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      best_q_p_pgls = ifelse(is.infinite(best_q_p_pgls), NA_real_, best_q_p_pgls),
      best_p_pgls = ifelse(is.infinite(best_p_pgls), NA_real_, best_p_pgls)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(significant_sites), best_q_p_pgls, best_p_pgls, Gene)
}

readr::write_tsv(gene_summary, "pgls_gene_summary.tsv")

tested_sites_n <- if (nrow(pgls_df) == 0) 0 else sum(is.finite(pgls_df$p_pgls))
significant_sites_n <- if (nrow(pgls_df) == 0) 0 else sum(pgls_df$sig_p_pgls %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
genes_n <- dplyr::n_distinct(pgls_df$Gene)
sig_genes_n <- if (nrow(gene_summary) == 0) 0 else sum(gene_summary$significant_sites > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
trait_model_df <- diag_df %>% filter(diag_type == "trait_model")
```

This report summarises **site-level phylogenetic GLS** results for `r params$traitname` using CT post-processed CAAS sites.

## Summary

```{r summary-table, echo=FALSE}
summary_tbl <- tibble(
  metric = c("Genes evaluated", "Sites tested", "Significant sites (q <= alpha)", "Genes with >=1 significant site"),
  value = c(genes_n, tested_sites_n, significant_sites_n, sig_genes_n)
)
kable(summary_tbl, col.names = c("Metric", "Value"))
```

## Top Site Hits

```{r top-site-hits, echo=FALSE}
top_hits <- if (nrow(pgls_df) == 0) {
  tibble()
} else {
  pgls_df %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_q = ifelse(is.finite(q_p_pgls) & q_p_pgls > 0, -log10(q_p_pgls), NA_real_)
    ) %>%
    arrange(q_p_pgls, p_pgls, desc(abs(beta_top))) %>%
    slice_head(n = params$top_hits_n) %>%
    select(Gene, Position, n_used, n_top_aa, n_bottom_aa, beta_top, p_pgls, q_p_pgls, sig_p_pgls)
}

if (nrow(top_hits) == 0) {
  cat("No tested sites were available.\n")
} else {
  kable(top_hits)
}
```

```{r qvalue-plot, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
plot_df <- pgls_df %>%
  filter(is.finite(q_p_pgls), q_p_pgls > 0, is.finite(beta_top)) %>%
  mutate(significant = ifelse(sig_p_pgls, "significant", "not_significant"))

if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) {
  plot.new()
  text(0.5, 0.5, "No finite q-values available for plotting")
} else {
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = beta_top, y = -log10(q_p_pgls), color = significant)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(significant = "#b22222", not_significant = "#4c78a8")) +
    labs(
      title = "Site-level PGLS hits",
      x = "beta_top",
      y = expression(-log[10](q[pgls])),
      color = NULL
    )
}
```

## Gene Summary

```{r gene-summary, echo=FALSE}
if (nrow(gene_summary) == 0) {
  cat("No gene summaries available.\n")
} else {
  kable(gene_summary %>% slice_head(n = params$top_genes_n))
}
```

## Trait Model Diagnostics

```{r trait-models, echo=FALSE}
if (nrow(trait_model_df) == 0) {
  cat("No trait-model diagnostics were emitted.\n")
} else {
  kable(
    trait_model_df %>%
      select(trait, model, theta, ll, aicc, lrt_df, lrt_stat, lrt_p, is_best_aicc) %>%
      arrange(trait, aicc)
  )
}
```

## Validation Coverage

```{r validation-summary, echo=FALSE}
validation_tbl <- tibble(
  dataset = c("Internal validation rows", "Extreme-membership rows"),
  rows = c(nrow(intval_df), nrow(extremes_df))
)
kable(validation_tbl)
```

## Directional Consistency

```{r directional-consistency, echo=FALSE}
if (!all(c("change_side", "sig_p_pgls_directional", "q_p_pgls_directional", "p_pgls_directional") %in% names(pgls_df))) {
  cat("Directional summary columns are not available in this run.\n")
} else {
  dir_df <- pgls_df %>%
    filter(change_side %in% c("top", "bottom", "both"))

  if (nrow(dir_df) == 0) {
    cat("No direction-eligible rows (top/bottom/both) were available.\n")
  } else {
    dir_summary <- dir_df %>%
      group_by(change_side) %>%
      summarise(
        tested_sites = sum(is.finite(p_pgls_directional)),
        significant_sites = sum(sig_p_pgls_directional %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
        best_q_directional = suppressWarnings(min(q_p_pgls_directional, na.rm = TRUE)),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(best_q_directional = ifelse(is.infinite(best_q_directional), NA_real_, best_q_directional))
    kable(dir_summary)
  }
}
```

## Excess Enrichment

```{r excess-summary, echo=FALSE}
if (nrow(excess_df) == 0) {
  cat("No excess enrichment table was emitted.\n")
} else {
  shown <- excess_df %>%
    arrange(q_hyper_excess, desc(excess_ratio), Gene) %>%
    mutate(log2_excess = ifelse(is.finite(excess_ratio) & excess_ratio > 0, log2(excess_ratio), NA_real_)) %>%
    select(trait, Gene, CAAP_Group, N_testable, K_sig_testable, n_testable_caas, k_sig_caas,
           excess_ratio, p_hyper_excess, q_hyper_excess, sig_hyper_excess)
  kable(shown %>% slice_head(n = 30))
}
```

```{r excess-plot, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if (nrow(excess_df) == 0) {
  plot.new()
  text(0.5, 0.5, "No excess enrichment rows available")
} else {
  plot_excess <- excess_df %>%
    filter(
      is.finite(excess_ratio), excess_ratio > 0,
      is.finite(q_hyper_excess), q_hyper_excess > 0
    ) %>%
    mutate(is_sig = ifelse(sig_hyper_excess, "significant", "not_significant"))

  if (nrow(plot_excess) == 0) {
    plot.new()
    text(0.5, 0.5, "No finite excess values available for plotting")
  } else {
    ggplot(plot_excess, aes(x = log2(excess_ratio), y = -log10(q_hyper_excess), color = is_sig)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c(significant = "#b22222", not_significant = "#4c78a8")) +
      labs(
        title = "Gene-level excess enrichment",
        x = "log2(excess_ratio)",
        y = expression(-log[10](q[hyper])),
        color = NULL
      )
  }
}
```
